title: At the Park 公园休闲
scene: 在公园散步、锻炼、看风景。

lines.en: What a beautiful day! Let us go to the park this afternoon.
lines.zh: 天气真好！我们今天下午去公园吧。

lines.en: Good idea! The park is really nice in spring. The flowers are all blooming.
lines.zh: 好主意！春天的公园特别美。花都开了。

lines.en: I like walking around the lake. There are many fish in the water.
lines.zh: 我喜欢在湖边散步。水里有很多鱼。

lines.en: Can we also ride bicycles? I saw a bike rental near the entrance.
lines.zh: 我们也可以骑自行车吗？我在入口附近看到有租自行车的。

lines.en: Sure! We can ride along the path. It is very safe.
lines.zh: 当然可以！我们可以沿着小路骑。很安全的。

lines.en: Look at those old people doing tai chi under the trees. They look so relaxed.
lines.zh: 你看那些在树下打太极的爷爷奶奶。他们看起来好放松。

lines.en: Yes, the park is a great place to exercise and enjoy nature.
lines.zh: 是的，公园真是一个锻炼身体和享受大自然的好地方。

lines.en: Let us bring some snacks next time and have a picnic on the grass.
lines.zh: 下次我们带些零食来，在草地上野餐吧。

lines.en: That sounds wonderful! I cannot wait!
lines.zh: 听起来太棒了！我都等不及了！
